title: Ubiquiti LBE-5AC-Gen2 - LiteBeam 5AC Generation 2, 5-Pack, PoE not included
category: Ubiquiti / Wireless / Outdoor units / AirMAX AC
description: The LiteBeam AC is an ultra-lightweight airMAX ac CPE device with incredible range and disruptive pricing The LiteBeam AC integrates a separate Wi-Fi radio for fast and easy setup using your mobile device Featuring enhanced protection against ESD events, the LiteBeam AC offers a more robust mount with separate azimuth and elevation adjustments airOS 8 provides powerful features, including airMAX ac protocol support, real-time RF analytics, and an all-new design for enhanced usability The LiteBeam AC provides 23 dBi of gain for long-distance connectivity and uses a directional antenna pattern for improved noise immunity Featuring the freedom of three-axis alignment, the LiteBeam AC fully assembles in seconds â no tools needed. Only a single wrench is required for pole-mounting A lightweight form factor contained within ultra-compact packaging, the LiteBeam AC is ideal for shipping and logistics Notice : the package does not contain PoE adapter. We can offer Gigabit or 100Mbps version Devices Antenna Holder Metal strap
